elements.description: Second flight of ST.3 (floor-2 plan view), steps numbered 1 through 10 with 'ลง' (down) arrow at top, continuing 17-16-15-14-13-12-11 further down toward the landing; tread dimension chain '9 @ 0.25 = 2.25'

warnings: Second of 2 views on this page; sibling is the floor-1 plan view _view1_st3_floor1_plan.json. Both drawn at 1:50.

Step numbering here (1-10 then continuing 17,16,15,14,13,12,11) reaches a maximum of 17 -- matching the sanitary background agent's independent finding of a '17-step stairwell' for this house, a good cross-discipline confirmation.
This is the top-of-stair floor-2 landing view, showing the flight descending (ลง) from the floor-2 level -- complements view1's ground-floor ascending (ขึ้น) view of the lower flight.
